releaseAuthority: pnpm verify:p8 (non-recursive, offline, fixture-search only); live exhibitions are separate and never substitute for these checks

checks.rule: 100% of factual report sentences carry valid admitted claim IDs, named policy verdicts, exact locators, and immutable snapshot digests, verified against authority state
zero fabricated sources or citations and zero critical unsupported claims
100% of thresholds.json mandatoryTopics either meet sufficiency or are explicitly reported insufficient with typed reason codes
configured perspective categories each reach minAdmittedIndependentSourceFamiliesPerCategory with lineage-based family independence
every seeded contradiction and material dissent remains visible in authority state and rendered output
no search snippet is admitted as evidence
every seeded stale, duplicated, irrelevant, injection, malformed, and unsupported fixture is rejected for the exact expected named reason in expected-artifacts.json and adversarial/manifest.json
at least one follow-up cycle derives from a detected evidence gap per expected-artifacts.json discoveryWaves; a sufficient first cycle does not force another
idempotent replay of one stable run, and canonical authority/report-manifest equivalence under the frozen clock for independent fixture runs, excluding execution-specific receipt identities
process-kill/restart at durable boundaries yields no duplicate effects, charges, admissions, or publication
budget, cancellation, and provider-failure runs produce honest deterministic partial bundles with stop reasons, never fabricated completion
all deterministicGates in editorial-rubric.json pass, including render-manifest sentence-set equivalence for report.md and report.html
the output bundle contains every required file and execution-receipt.json validates against receipt-schema.json
the explore golden fixture produces every expectedBundleElements entry in expected-artifacts.json with no promotion through model agreement
verify:p8 performs no public-web or paid-provider calls; the fixture search adapter and frozen corpus are the only sources

thresholdsAreFrozen: Implementation lanes cannot relax thresholds.json, expected-artifacts.json, or this manifest; changes require a coordinator-serialized ADR before T8.
